fixesApplied.title: BLOCKER RESOLVED: 4 test files written (50 tests)
CRITICAL RESOLVED: ModifyDetail now diffs name field
CRITICAL RESOLVED: nextId computed from pre-remove array
CRITICAL RESOLVED: retryEvalsSave clears error on success
MAJOR RESOLVED: null guards on assertions in AddDetail/RemoveDetail/ModifyDetail

findings.title: Path traversal via unsanitized URL params (pre-existing)
findings.issue: resolveSkillDir takes URL params without validating for .. segments. Pre-existing issue, not introduced by 0486.
findings.suggestion: Add path traversal validation in resolveSkillDir
findings.impact: Low risk for local dev tool.

findings.title: LLM delimiter collision in response parsing
findings.issue: Parsing splits on first occurrence of ---REASONING--- and ---EVAL_CHANGES---. LLM could echo these in improved content.

findings.title: Redundant evalChanges in both aiEditResult and aiEditEvalChanges
Expand/collapse button has no accessible label
Linear scan O(n*m) for originalEval lookup

notes: Re-grilled after fixing all blocker, critical, and major findings. 5 fixes applied: (1) 4 test files with 50 tests written, (2) ModifyDetail name diff, (3) nextId pre-remove computation, (4) retryEvalsSave error clearing, (5) null guards on assertions. Remaining findings are minor/medium and safe to ship.
